comments: Browser-based color vision deficiency simulator. All image processing happens client-side (no upload), helping designers and content creators identify color accessibility issues by previewing their work as CVD users would perceive it.
features: Upload any image to instantly see how it looks to people with color vision deficiency. Simulates 8 types of color blindness (Protanopia, Deuteranopia, Tritanopia and their anomalous forms, plus Achromatopsia) using the Brettel/Viénot/Mollon algorithm. Helps designers check whether colors, charts and UI remain distinguishable. Free, runs in-browser,
title: Color Blindness Simulator
